title: AHCP Response (v0.2)
description: Hub->Agent response envelope for a resolved ask/task. Pushed (signed, see spec 9.2) or embedded in the GET body. `resolution` is a flat union; per-verb validity (ask: answered|declined|cancelled|expired; task: completed|dismissed|expired) is Hub-enforced + covered by a conformance vector.

resolution_id.description: Hub-assigned, opaque, random; identical across every channel and retry. Agent dedups on (in_reply_to, resolution_id).

agent.description: responseAgent: routing identity only (runtime NOT required on the return leg).

defaulted.description: True iff the resolution came from default_on_expire (then actor MUST be system:default_on_expire).

response.description: Present for ask; for task present only to carry comment/checklist (no value); never for notify.

value.description: ask only: chosen option value (string, select/confirm) or the input object (input). Absent for task.

state.description: Opaque agent blob round-tripped verbatim. UNTRUSTED until the agent verifies integrity it applied (spec 9.3).
